{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Dragonblood Thunderbolt
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dragonblood Thunderbolt]] is a powerful technique in [[Calan Archer]]'s [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
